case_title: ADRENALINE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC VS AGAVE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ADRENALINE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT AGAVE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-04-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-14-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MEDIATED SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUED FOR ANOTHER PROGRESS REPORT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-28-2004, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO AUG-04-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRAVELING OUT OF COUNTRY DUE TO JOB REQUIREMENT,

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-14-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-25-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFT TO RESUME PYMTS OF $500/MO. TO PLTF NO LATER THAN THE 10TH OF EACH MONTH PURSUANT TO MEDIATED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. IF ANY PYMT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE WILL BECOME DUE IMMEDIATELY.
IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-25-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-07-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 MODIFIED SETTLEMENT BETWWEEN THE PARTIES. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $250 PER MONTH MINIMUM, BEGINNING ON JAN. 10, 2005 & ON OR BEFORE THE 10TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-13-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT ON SETTLEMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT AGAVE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR IN BEHALF OF PARTY, FILED BY ADRIANA FERRER.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AGAVE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC
